collection.title: Southern City Field Notes
collection.description: Ten repeated editorial image roles across five Southern cities.

assets.title: New Orleans / Street field note
assets.disclosure: RICE visual reconstruction / generated from editorial direction / not an authenticated historical record
assets.alt: Deadpan documentary view of present-day service infrastructure in New Orleans, Louisiana.
assets.prompt: Asset type: wide section feature. Locked-off street-level view of a working drainage pump station beside a wet neutral-ground curb after summer rain, contemporary New Orleans. Include flood-gauge paint, a utility cabinet with a taped maintenance slip, power lines, standing water, and a single distant security light. Place the pump structure in the upper-right and preserve quiet dark pavement in the lower-left. No people; infrastructure is the subject.

assets.title: New Orleans / Working interior
assets.disclosure: RICE visual reconstruction / generated from editorial direction / not an authenticated historical record
assets.alt: Working interior in New Orleans, Louisiana showing practical equipment and evidence of recent use.
assets.prompt: Asset type: article figure. Direct-flash interior of a cramped community print room in contemporary New Orleans: old copier, paper reams, box fan, damp drywall seam, extension cord, folding table, and one St. Expedite prayer card taped inside an open supply cabinet. Show evidence of recent use but no person. Frame at working distance, slightly clipped at one edge, with every practical material legible and no staged literary props.

assets.title: New Orleans / Archival evidence
assets.disclosure: RICE visual reconstruction / generated from editorial direction / not an authenticated historical record
assets.alt: Generated archival reconstruction composed from documents and material evidence associated with New Orleans, Louisiana.
assets.prompt: Asset type: archival reconstruction. Straight overhead copy-bed arrangement of a contemporary storm-drain maintenance log, pump inspection receipt, folded ward map fragment, rust-stained fastener, ruler, and water-warped parish form. Keep all prominent writing incidental or unreadable; make no factual historical claim. Arrange records along the top and right while leaving clean black copy-bed space at lower-left. Include one cropped accession stamp as the unresolved element.

assets.title: New Orleans / Service threshold
assets.disclosure: RICE visual reconstruction / generated from editorial direction / not an authenticated historical record
assets.alt: Candid 2011 documentary reconstruction of a young adult woman at a service threshold in New Orleans, Louisiana.
assets.prompt: Direct-flash vertical portrait outside the service door of a neighborhood bar just after closing in humid August 2011. She wears a faded sleeveless black blouse, cut-off denim shorts over opaque tights, battered ankle boots, and a narrow silver chain; damp dark hair sticks lightly at her temples. She holds a ring of utility keys and looks past the photographer with tired private amusement. Wet concrete, stacked plastic chairs, ice-machine drain, breaker conduit, utility meter, and one red votive cup remain visible. An unexplained wet footprint crosses behind her.

She sorts a fresh print run, striking pale face, short dark hair, striped long-sleeve shirt, high-waisted black trousers, worn canvas shoes, natural ink marks on her fingertips. Show ink drums with labels obscured, paper offcuts, cutter safely closed, folding chair, exposed pipe, shipping tape, clipboard note too small to read, and one drawer left open. She is caught listening to someone outside frame rather than posing.

She carries flattened poster tubes and a canvas shoulder bag, wearing a thrifted pea coat, faded cotton dress, black tights, and scuffed boots. She turns back toward her companion, hair moving in cold wind; one copier-paper band is caught on the fence.

assets.alt: Candid 2011 documentary reconstruction of a young adult woman in a laundromat in Richmond, Virginia.
assets.prompt: Vertical fluorescent documentary photograph in an urban laundromat before sunrise in winter 2011. She folds print-shop rags and dark clothes, exceptionally beautiful but tired, blunt bob slightly mussed, oversized cardigan, plain undershirt, narrow jeans, old leather shoes. Broad focus shows scratched folding table, coin slots, plastic cart, exposed pipe, unreadable maintenance note, salt tracked on tile, and a transit transfer. She looks steadily at the photographer; one pristine sheet of copier paper rests inside the empty cart.
